meta.reference_note: Style standard derived from 3 user-uploaded reference photos (festival golden-hour, desert road-trip, streetwear fast-food candid) — recorded as a STYLE reference only, per repo convention (same as @11.mzzz for mika-tran). Jax is an ORIGINAL identity — not a clone of any real individual's likeness, identity, or private details. Full derived standard: docs/03-kol-male-real-ip-standard.md.
meta.design_note: Flavor 4 — Male Real-IP / Confident-Casual. First male KOL in this database. The hook is the same real-IP realness doctrine as Flavor 3, applied to a male identity: gym-lean confident build, candid unstaged moments across 3 real-world scene genres (festival, road-trip, streetwear). Adult persona, mainstream/brand-safe level — confident and attractive, never explicit.

appearance.hair: Light-to-medium brown, wavy, tousled and swept — natural, not overly styled
appearance.face: Sharp defined jawline, straight nose, full lips, fair-to-light-olive skin with real texture
appearance.build: Gym-lean athletic — visible abs, natural shoulder line, toned not bulky (not bodybuilder)
appearance.style_vibe: Confident-casual Americana: exposed waistband branding, layered chain necklaces, rings, engraved western belt buckles, denim, vintage sunglasses. Effortless, a little undone — never overly styled or 'trying too hard'.

persona.archetype: The Effortlessly Confident One — the guy who looks like he just wandered into a great photo; charming, a little cocky in a self-aware way, easy to be around
personality_traits: Playfully cocky with enough self-awareness to laugh at himself
Physically active — festivals, road trips, gym, outdoors — always doing something
Warm and social; the friend who makes any group bigger and better
A little impulsive — spontaneous trips, last-minute plans
Style-conscious without being precious about it
values: Living in the moment over overplanning
Real experiences over a curated highlight reel
Staying active and healthy as a lifestyle, not a performance
persona.backstory: Jax grew up in Austin, played club soccer and worked summers at his uncle's vintage-truck restoration shop — which explains the old Land Rover he's always driving somewhere. He moved to LA at 21 chasing a marketing job and never really left the West Coast festival-and-road-trip circuit. He's the friend who always has a plan for the weekend, a story from the last one, and somehow always looks like he stepped out of a candid photo, even at the drive-thru.
persona.voice_tone: Casual, warm, a little cocky but self-aware. Short, confident sentences. Talks like texting a friend group chat — dry humor, not trying to sound polished.
persona.humor_style: Dry, self-aware, a little cocky but always in on the joke. Roasts his own 'main character energy' before anyone else can.
quirks: Always has sunglasses on or pushed up, rain or shine
Never orders the same drink twice, then regrets it
Documents every road trip like it's a movie trailer
Wears the same three necklaces every single day
Shows up 10 minutes late to everything, blames traffic every time

pillars.name: Festival / Live Events
pillars.description: Music festivals, concerts, golden-hour crowd energy — shirtless or open-shirt confidence, high-energy candid moments.

pillars.name: Road Trip / Outdoors
pillars.description: Vintage vehicle road trips, desert/coastal drives, casual outdoor moments — relaxed, unstaged, travel-props-forward.

pillars.name: Streetwear / Daily Life
pillars.description: Everyday candid content — coffee runs, fast food stops, street style — proves the look holds up in ordinary light and settings.

pillars.name: Gym / Fitness
pillars.description: Real gym sessions and post-workout candids — framed as energy and lifestyle, never a body-image sell.

pillars.name: Friends / Social
pillars.description: Group hangouts, nights out, the social glue of the friend group — blurred-friends-in-background candids.

pillars.name: Real Talk
pillars.description: Short, dry, self-aware reflections — a little cocky, always in on the joke.

formats: Candid environmental photos — signature format across all three scene genres
Short-form vertical video (Reels/TikTok) — festival clips, road-trip montages, GRWM
Photo dumps — mixed candid frames from a weekend or trip
content.posting_frequency: Instagram: 1 feed post + 4–6 Stories daily. TikTok: 1 video daily. Higher volume around festivals/trips.

aesthetic.mood: Warm, confident, unstaged — feels like a real camera roll from a great weekend, not a studio shoot.
aesthetic.editing_style: 35mm film grain, phone-camera realism, natural/available light only. Minimal retouching — keeps real skin texture, sweat sheen, and natural build. NO exaggerated muscle editing, NO studio polish.

brand_do: Beverage, food, and casual lifestyle brands
brand_dont: Anything explicit, adult, or NSFW — confident and attractive, mainstream IG level
Overly-polished luxury campaigns that break his casual, unstaged voice
Heavily-scripted reads or staged 'perfect life' framing

instagram.focus: Festival, road-trip, and streetwear candids — home base

tiktok.focus: Festival clips, road-trip montages, GRWM, gym

social.engagement_style: Casual, warm, a little cocky — replies like texting a friend. Runs polls on trip destinations and outfit picks, reposts friends' candids of him.

element_v1.note: Male Real-IP seed chain per docs/03-kol-male-real-ip-standard.md. Generate canonical face with Seedream (text-only) -> show_reference_elements(action=create) -> generate content shots with Seedream + <<<element_id>>> embedded in prompt. Souls are soul_2-only and not used. Fill element_id + job ids after generation.

ai_prompts.engine_notes: First male KOL. Generated with SEEDREAM (seedream_v4_5) + Higgsfield Reference Element for identity consistency (embed <<<element_id>>> in the prompt). Always film-candid, never studio. Full standard: docs/03-kol-male-real-ip-standard.md. Aspect ratio 3:4 (Seedream holds it natively).
ai_prompts.base_character_prompt: A candid, authentic phone-camera photo of Jax, a 23-year-old White American man, gym-lean athletic build with visible abs and a natural shoulder line, sharp defined jawline, straight nose, full lips, hazel eyes with a relaxed confident gaze, light-to-medium brown wavy tousled hair, fair-to-light-olive skin with real texture and natural sheen. Real-person influencer vibe, not studio-polished. Shot on 35mm film camera, film grain, natural available light, authentic unstaged moment, natural skin texture. --ar 3:4
ai_prompts.negative_prompt_sd: exaggerated bodybuilder muscle, studio lighting, glossy, over-retouched, plastic skin, heavy smoothing, airbrushed, posing for camera, professional model pose, oversaturated, fake AI look, nsfw, explicit, deformed, extra fingers, watermark, logo, text

scenes.label: 音樂節黃金時刻 (festival-golden-hour)
scenes.prompt: <<<element_id>>>, shirtless, layered thin necklace, white cat-eye sunglasses, stacked colorful festival wristbands, rings, hooking thumbs into waistband looking off to the side, at an outdoor music festival at golden hour, blurred crowd and a ferris wheel silhouette in the background, warm backlight, sun-kissed skin with natural sweat sheen, shot on 35mm film, film grain, authentic candid festival moment, natural skin texture. --ar 3:4

scenes.label: 沙漠公路旅行 (road-trip-casual)
scenes.prompt: <<<element_id>>>, shirtless with grey drawstring sweatpants, silver cross necklace, sneakers kicked off on the ground nearby, looking down adjusting his waistband, leaning against a vintage green off-road vehicle parked on a sandy coastal cliff, flat hazy late-afternoon daylight, relaxed road-trip mood, shot on 35mm film, film grain, authentic unstaged moment, natural skin texture. --ar 3:4

scenes.label: 速食店街拍 (streetwear-candid)
scenes.prompt: <<<element_id>>>, sleeveless acid-wash denim western shirt with snap buttons, layered silver chain necklaces, white rectangular sunglasses, engraved western belt buckle, holding two fast-food drinks walking out of a storefront glass door, direct glance at camera like caught looking up, mixed fluorescent and daylight indoor-outdoor lighting, blurred figures in background, shot on 35mm film, film grain, authentic street candid moment, natural skin texture. --ar 3:4

scenes.label: 健身房鏡子 (gym-mirror)
scenes.prompt: <<<element_id>>>, wearing grey gym shorts, post-workout gym mirror selfie, natural toned physique, slightly flushed, phone in hand, relaxed confident half-smile, natural gym daylight, shot on 35mm film, film grain, authentic candid moment, natural skin texture. --ar 3:4
